issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which indicates the effect applies for the remainder of the current turn. This should be duration:'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. 'EndOfTurn' implies the effect expires at end of turn, but 'during this turn' is a broader temporal scope that persists until turn end.
Target should be 'OpponentCharacter' (singular selection up to 1), not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter'. The phrase 'up to 1' indicates optional selection of a single opponent character.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −4 cost during this turn.
